_comment: Manual (non-plugin) install of searchoclock — for users who don't use the plugin marketplace.
1) Copy searchoclock.sh to .claude/hooks/searchoclock.sh and run: chmod +x .claude/hooks/searchoclock.sh
2) Merge the "hooks" block below into your .claude/settings.json (project or user).
Dependencies: bash + python3 on PATH. The hook never blocks (always exit 0).
Optional tuning (environment variables, defaults shown):
SEARCHOCLOCK_ENABLE=1            master kill switch
SEARCHOCLOCK_COOLDOWN_SEC=900    per-error-signature dedup window
SEARCHOCLOCK_MIN_INTERVAL_SEC=60 global rate limit between injections
SEARCHOCLOCK_MAX_PER_SESSION=8   hard ceiling of injections per session
SEARCHOCLOCK_SEVERITY_MIN=low    minimum severity to inject (low|medium|high)
SEARCHOCLOCK_TEAM_SIZE=3         parallel researchers suggested for high severity (max 5)
SEARCHOCLOCK_GOAL_SCOPE=auto     auto|off|<literal scope string>
SEARCHOCLOCK_STATE_DIR=$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.searchoclock
Double-validation (independent second model) knobs:
SEARCHOCLOCK_VALIDATE=1                                  master switch for the validation gate
SEARCHOCLOCK_VALIDATOR_MODEL=claude-haiku-4-5-20251001  independent verifier model id
SEARCHOCLOCK_VALIDATOR_ESCALATE_MODEL=claude-sonnet-4-6 verifier on disagreement/low confidence
SEARCHOCLOCK_VALIDATOR_CROSS_PROVIDER=                  non-Anthropic verifier id for high-severity/irreversible fixes
SEARCHOCLOCK_VALIDATE_MIN_CONFIDENCE=4                  integer (1-5) trust floor
Proactive pre-flight (opt-in, off by default) + workflow/scorecard knobs:
SEARCHOCLOCK_PROACTIVE=0                 1 = enable the PreToolUse pre-flight nudge (selective)
SEARCHOCLOCK_PROACTIVE_GUARD=off         off|ask|deny for destructive commands (never blocks unless ask/deny)
SEARCHOCLOCK_PROACTIVE_TRIGGERS=dep,destructive,version   which trigger classes are armed
SEARCHOCLOCK_SCORECARD=0                 1 = emit the Q/T/R scorecard from the validator
SEARCHOCLOCK_MAX_GLOBAL=24               cross-agent injection ceiling (dynamic-workflow concurrency)
SEARCHOCLOCK_WORKFLOW_TEAM_SIZE=2        high-severity fan-out inside a workflow/subagent
WORKFLOW MODE: web tools + the subagents must be pre-allowed (see the permissions block below),
or the researcher/validator stall on a mid-run prompt inside background/workflow agents.

permissions._comment: Required for workflow / background-agent mode so the researcher/validator don't stall on a prompt.
